description:
Journey across civilisations and realms in Jigsaw Puzzle: Worlds Beyond, a relaxing jigsaw experience spanning the most wondrous places in history and legend. Explore the grandeur of Ancient Rome, wander through the Mystical Magic Vale, and discover breathtaking worlds unlike any other!

The game features 30 handcrafted levels, each depicting a unique world filled with rich detail and atmosphere. Play using touch controls or controllers! With the built-in saving system, you can stop whenever you want and continue later without losing progress.

Designed for both short sessions and extended play, Jigsaw Puzzle: Worlds Beyond is perfect for relaxing on the go or unwinding at home.

Features:

›30 handcrafted jigsaw levels spanning extraordinary worlds and eras
›Diverse, richly illustrated artwork — from the marble columns of Ancient Rome to the enchanted glades of the Mystical Magic Vale
›Touch controls and controller support, switch anytime
›Save and resume freely whenever you want
›A calm, cozy experience for all ages
